completion_definition_target: CDEF-2DER-OFFRAMP-v1 (to be registered when flag set is approved)
note: All flags currently UNMET. Each requires the listed fields; VERIFIED/satisfaction needs acceptance_test_ids + run_ids (+ jrev_ids for CLASS-H/N) — never Claude explanation alone. LIVE_WORKER_MINIMAL_PASS != CLAUDE_CODE_IMPL_DEP_REMOVED_CLASS_S/M.

flags.scope: Taka reads status/forecast/roadmap/intervention/flags via UI without Claude relay
counterfactual_conditions: UI returns values resolvable to ledger ids (not fabricated)

flags.scope: Taka issues scoped single-use approval tokens + intake via UI without Claude relay
counterfactual_conditions: approval issued from UI, not relayed by Claude
bare boolean forbidden; scoped token bound to task+op

flags.scope: task packet -> workspace -> 1-file change -> deterministic test -> independent judge -> EGL chain -> commit proposal, Claude session CLOSED
counterfactual_conditions: no Claude Code process/session exists during the loop (run metadata proof)
Claude does not input task / run shell / recover failure / interpret test / act as judge / generate commit proposal
commit proposal only, no human-approve-less commit

flags.scope: model routing decision accepted on real benchmark provenance
live worker coding output meets a coding-quality acceptance bar
counterfactual_conditions: Pass@k / task-success acceptance on live worker output, not self-reported

flags.scope: CLASS-T changes complete the full loop without Claude Code
counterfactual_conditions: depends on LIVE_WORKER_MINIMAL_PASS + CLASS-T counterfactual runs

flags.scope: CLASS-S changes complete the full loop without Claude Code (do NOT generalize from CLASS-S sandbox success)
counterfactual_conditions: depends on CLASS_T + CODING_QUALITY_ACCEPTANCE_PASS + MODEL_ROUTING_READY + sandbox security

flags.scope: CLASS-M changes complete the full loop without Claude Code
a qualified heterogeneous-weight adjudicator pool is available for CLASS-N/H L2 (NOT a Claude-removal target; the dependency itself)
counterfactual_conditions: CLASS-N/H impl-dep removal is future-evaluable; L2 audit dependency is NOT removed, expressed as dependency on this pool
